---
title: "Frequently Asked Questions"
author: 
  name: Ian Márquez-López
  email: iamarquez@recerca.clinic.cat
  affiliation: Institut d’Investigacions Biomèdiques August Pi i Sunyer (FRCB-IDIBAPS)
date: 'Compiled: `r format(Sys.Date(), "%B %d, %Y")`'
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{IgScan FAQ}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, echo=FALSE}
options(rmarkdown.html_vignette.check_title = FALSE)
```

🚧 **Coming Soon**

Since this is the first release of **IgScan**, we do not have frequently asked questions yet.

We will update this section as users begin to interact with the package and share their doubts or suggestions.

In the meantime, feel free to:

-   Check out the [Getting Started](../index.html) guide.

-   Explore the [Reference](../reference/index.html) section.

-   Open an [issue on GitHub](https://github.com/IanMarquezIDIBAPS/IgScan/issues) if you have any questions.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Thank you for using **IgScan**!
